entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea subsp. fastigiata var. vulgaris

entities.name: ICGS 1
entities.description: A peanut cultivar released in 1990 derived from a single-plant selection

entities.name: ROBUT 33-1
entities.description: A groundnut cultivar used in a natural hybrid population

entities.name: KADIRI 3
entities.description: A groundnut cultivar used in a natural hybrid population

entities.name: JL24
entities.description: A national standard groundnut cultivar

entities.name: AK12-24
entities.description: A standard groundnut cultivar

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The weight of pods produced per unit area

entities.name: GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: The physical form of the plant, described as decumbent 2 to decumbent 3

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the plant to reach maturity, 112 to 120 days

entities.name: MEAT CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of meat in the groundnut pod, averaging 70%

entities.name: SEED COLOUR
entities.description: The color of the seeds, described as tan

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of 100 seeds, measured at 35 g

entities.name: OIL CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of oil in the seeds, measured at 51%

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of protein in the seeds, measured at 21%

entities.name: OLEIC TO LINOLEIC FATTY ACID RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of oleic to linoleic fatty acids, measured at 1.44

entities.name: BUD NECROSIS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to tolerate bud necrosis disease

entities.name: DROUGHT RECOVERY
entities.description: The ability of pod yield to recover from midseason drought

entities.name: SINGLE-PLANT SELECTION
entities.description: The breeding method used to derive ICGS 1

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: Cultivation period from July to October

entities.name: SPRING SEASON
entities.description: Cultivation period in the spring

entities.name: MIDSEASON DROUGHT
entities.description: Environmental stress occurring during the middle of the growing season

entities.name: BUD NECROSIS DISEASE
entities.description: A disease affecting groundnuts caused by a virus

entities.name: TOMATO SPOTTED WILT VIRUS
entities.description: The virus that causes bud necrosis disease

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the cultivar was released and tested

entities.name: UTTAR PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where ICGS 1 is cultivated

entities.name: BIHAR
entities.description: A state in India where ICGS 1 is cultivated

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: A state in India where ICGS 1 is cultivated

entities.name: HARYANA
entities.description: A state in India where ICGS 1 is cultivated

entities.name: PUNJAB
entities.description: A state in India where ICGS 1 is cultivated

entities.name: ZONE I
entities.description: An agricultural zone in India

entities.name: NATURAL HYBRID POPULATION
entities.description: A population of hybrids occurring naturally from which selection is made
